cloverRetributionBeginnerGuide.title: Clover Retribution Beginner Guide
cloverRetributionBeginnerGuide.intro: This Clover Retribution beginner route helps you avoid wasted spins and early stat resets.

items.title: Join official game hubs
items.body: Join the Roblox game page and official Roblox community before redeeming group-gated rewards.

items.title: Redeem code rewards first
items.body: Claim active codes in the main menu and save part of your spins for your final build.

items.title: Use quests for stable leveling
items.body: Story and repeatable quests provide steady EXP and cleaner early progression.

items.title: Match stats to your combat plan
items.body: Balance Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Constitution around your core magic and weapon style.

cloverRetributionMagicGrimoireTierList.title: Clover Retribution Magic and Grimoire Tier List
cloverRetributionMagicGrimoireTierList.intro: Compare Clover Retribution magic options by tier, role, and upgrade ceiling.

cloverRetributionRaceTierList.title: Clover Retribution Race Tier List
cloverRetributionRaceTierList.intro: Compare the strongest Clover Retribution races by rarity, stat bonuses, passive value, and best build fit.

entries.name: Starborn
entries.why: +65 Intelligence, +20% Mana, and +50% magic damage resistance for top mage scaling.

entries.name: Solean
entries.why: Hybrid stats, flame immunity, and custom flight utility.

entries.name: Ryomen
entries.why: Sustain-focused regen package for tanky solo play.

entries.name: Mahari
entries.why: Adaptive Resistance plus +25% Mana for long fights.

entries.name: Dreadscale
entries.why: Large HP and resistance package for frontline builds.

entries.name: Legendary Kynthari
entries.why: Speed, HP, and Zenith Surge for aggressive melee routes.

entries.name: Primordial Human
entries.why: High STR/DEX/CON spread with bonus HP and speed.

entries.name: Siphonite
entries.why: Mana regeneration and sustain skills for caster durability.

entries.name: High Elf
entries.why: Reliable magic damage and mana boosts.

entries.name: Sylvan
entries.why: Strong healing output and support utility.

entries.name: Kynthari
entries.why: Fast physical progression with HP bonus and Zenith Surge.

entries.name: Dark Elf
entries.why: High fire-damage synergy for Fire builds.

entries.name: High Orc
entries.why: Strong Strength-focused physical scaling.

entries.name: Lynthari
entries.why: Dexterity-focused evasive and mobility play.

entries.name: Gorgon
entries.why: Piercing bonuses with poison and petrification immunity.

entries.name: Stonekin
entries.why: High survivability and anti-bludgeoning defense.

entries.name: Dryad
entries.why: Healing-output support for utility casters.

entries.name: Hybrid Dwarf
entries.why: Great mastery/EXP route with durable caster utility.

entries.name: Hybrid Elf
entries.why: Early hybrid value but lower late-game ceiling.

entries.name: Beast
entries.why: Good early bludgeoning support.

entries.name: Orc
entries.why: Starter Strength option before better rolls.

entries.name: Goblin
entries.why: Useful for gold farming over combat.

entries.name: Dwarf
entries.why: Crafting economy utility with low combat impact.

entries.name: Human
entries.why: No direct buffs, best replaced when race spins are available.

cloverRetributionTraitsTierList.title: Clover Retribution Traits Tier List
cloverRetributionTraitsTierList.intro: Rank Clover Retribution traits by rarity, passive impact, build synergy, and reroll priority.

entries.name: Power Of Friendship
entries.why: Cheat-death trigger plus recovery and short i-frames.

entries.name: Mystical Eyes
entries.why: Broad stat boosts with burst scaling stacks.

entries.name: Monstrous Reserves
entries.why: Massive mana pool and regeneration for long rotations.

entries.name: Divine Restriction
entries.why: Top no-magic physical trait with mobility and survivability.

entries.name: Dragon's Blessing
entries.why: Frequent wish-based utility and sustain options.

entries.name: Adaptive Resistance
entries.why: Mahari-exclusive adaptive defense and offense utility.

entries.name: High Speed Regeneration
entries.why: Ryomen sustain trait for extended fights.

entries.name: Prodigy
entries.why: Very high progression speed with global stat support.

entries.name: Heavenly Restricted
entries.why: Excellent physical damage route with heavy mana penalty.

entries.name: Arcane Zenith
entries.why: Major mana-consumption cut for caster builds.

entries.name: Mana Rampage
entries.why: Strong magic damage increase when mana sustain is solved.

entries.name: Tenacity
entries.why: Reliable low-HP damage reduction for boss survivability.

entries.name: Boss Slayer
entries.why: High boss damage with manageable movement tradeoff.

entries.name: Loved by Mana
entries.why: Large flat mana boost for spell-heavy setups.

entries.name: Lyrical Surge
entries.why: Useful party-wide offense/defense support cycle.

entries.name: Warrior's Might
entries.why: Doubles block health on Strength-focused assignments.

entries.name: Arcane Insight
entries.why: Strong clover EXP and conditional magic scaling.

entries.name: Swift Reflexes
entries.why: Mobility and perfect-dodge improvements for DEX builds.

entries.name: Unyielding Sentinel
entries.why: Scaling passive defense, strongest when low HP.

entries.name: Zenith Surge
entries.why: Kynthari-exclusive low-HP damage scaling.

entries.name: Nature's Bond
entries.why: Sylvan-exclusive forest zone stat boost.

entries.name: Noble
entries.why: Good early mana increase for casters.

entries.name: Superior Speed
entries.why: Simple mobility boost for comfort.

entries.name: Mystic Savant
entries.why: Solid placeholder mana-efficiency trait.

entries.name: Gaia's Blessing
entries.why: Niche value for Earth and Sand builds.

entries.name: Gold Fever
entries.why: Useful for economy farming, not final combat.

entries.name: Mana Block
entries.why: Defensive unlock trait with limited long-term value.

entries.name: Scholar
entries.why: Minor Intelligence bonus, easy reroll later.

entries.name: Arcane Adept
entries.why: Basic mana efficiency with low ceiling.

entries.name: Finesse Master
entries.why: Small early Dexterity value only.

entries.name: Fighter
entries.why: Starter physical stat mix, easy to replace.

entries.name: Average
entries.why: No direct advantage, immediate reroll target.

cloverRetributionStatsWeaponsCraftingGui.title: Clover Retribution Stats, Weapons, and Crafting Guide
cloverRetributionStatsWeaponsCraftingGui.intro: Build around one main Clover Retribution damage path first, then align race, trait, stat allocation, and gear bonuses to that same route.

items.name: Strength Builds
items.description: Improves bludgeoning-focused physical damage and blocking strength.
items.tip: Best with High Orc, Dreadscale, Primordial Human, or Stonekin.

items.name: Dexterity Builds
items.description: Improves slashing and piercing routes for fast weapon play.
items.tip: Best with Lynthari, Gorgon, Primordial Human, or Kynthari routes.

items.name: Intelligence Builds
items.description: Improves magic damage and grimoire-focused scaling.
items.tip: Best with Starborn, High Elf, Solean, and Arcane-focused traits.

items.name: Constitution Builds
items.description: Improves survivability through higher HP and durable scaling.
items.tip: Best with Ryomen, Dreadscale, Stonekin, and defensive traits.

items.name: 60% Stat Focus Traits
items.description: Heavy assigned points in one stat can unlock focused trait routes.
items.tip: Plan trait goals before spending points so rerolls and stats match.

items.name: Weapon Scaling Shortcut
items.description: Bludgeoning favors Strength, slashing and piercing favor Dexterity, and spells favor Intelligence.
items.tip: Decide physical, magic, tank, or hybrid before expensive rerolls.

items.name: Crafting and Gear Priority
items.description: Use armor and accessories that reinforce your core stat plan.
items.tip: Avoid random mixed bonuses that dilute your main build route.

items.name: Menu and Loadout Controls
items.description: R equips weapon, G equips grimoire, M opens build and reroll management.
items.tip: Check current loadout before using rare rerolls or key resources.

cloverRetributionUpdateLogDevilRaceGuide.title: Clover Retribution Update Log and Devil Race Guide
cloverRetributionUpdateLogDevilRaceGuide.intro: Track the current Clover Retribution Devil Race update cycle, key codes, and reroll priorities before committing to final build paths.

items.title: Devil Race Release
items.description: The experience is focused on Devil Race demand and race-spin value; protect top race and trait keeps before over-rerolling.

items.title: Devil Race Release Spin Codes
items.description: !devilracerelease (350), !fixingstuff (150), !iwasbusy (100), with group and level requirements where listed.

items.title: Devil's Host
items.description: Core devil-progression trait route for Devil Union and devil contract progression.

items.title: Hybrid-Devil Progression
items.description: Progression uses devil parts, souls, and corruption risk through visible transformation stages.

items.title: What to Reroll First
items.description: Use race spins for high-value race targets, trait spins for build-defining passives, then magic spins after build direction is fixed.

items.title: Official Update Sources
items.description: Prioritize Roblox page status plus official Discord and Trello updates before spending limited resources.

faq.title: Clover Retribution
faq.subtitle: Common Clover Retribution questions for new and returning players.

questions.question: How do I redeem Clover Retribution codes?
questions.answer: Open Clover Retribution, use the main-menu code box, paste the code exactly, and submit before entering your server.

questions.question: What is the best Clover Retribution route for beginners?
questions.answer: Join the official group, redeem active codes, level through repeatable quests, and commit to rerolls only after testing your preferred magic path.

questions.question: Where can I find official Clover Retribution updates?
questions.answer: Use the Clover Retribution Discord and Trello links in the resource module for official notices and system references.

cta.title: Start Your Clover Retribution Build
cta.description: Use the modules above to lock your race, magic, trait, and progression path.
